text:
A commit in branch main references this bug:

commit b3650b92314c1ab720ac429362b27017ff928e1e
Author:     Robert Clausecker <fuz@FreeBSD.org>

Commit:     Robert Clausecker <fuz@FreeBSD.org>

    www/ladybird: fix build with recent clang

    Recent clang wants <> after the template keyword.  Pull in an upstream
    commit to give clang what it desires.

    Reported by:    yuri
    PR:             276703
    MFH:            2025Q1
